sections.paragraph:
Original: יזליאה

Transliteration: yizlı̂y'âh

Phonetic: yiz-lee-aw'

BDB Definition:

Jezliah = "whom God will preserve"
  1. a Benjamite of the sons of Elpaal

Origin: perhaps from an unused root (meaning to draw up)

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
